name: toxtempassistant-frontend
description: Frontend build for ToxTempAssistant. Compiles custom Bootstrap utility classes from SCSS into a small overlay (theme.css) layered on the CDN Bootstrap: the indigo 'suggestion tier' accent and the orange RISK-HUNT3R readiness utilities. Build is dev/CI-only (Dart Sass); the compiled CSS is committed and copied into the Docker image, so no Node is needed at runtime.
